name: Uma Musume RP - Tracen Academy (Uma POV)
description:
[ 🐎 An RP set in the setting of Uma Musume, where you are a university student of Tracen Academy. ✨ ]

Win the URA Finale, join the student council, or simply horse around in the world of Uma Musume to your heart’s content. Tracen Academy is a university in this bot.

[ SFW ONLY. Disclaimer: I do not own the rights to these characters. ]

Bot is a WIP. Updated July 13 2025 for more clarity & detail.

Note: Include your trainer description in Chat Memory if you have one for a better experience. The bot does not come with one. Due to limited description memory, not all characters are likely to be included. Please let me know if you experience any issues!

Artwork from the anime.
creator: anthracite
